title: Advice Surgeries | Chris Bloore MP
headings: h3: How to Book an Appointment
text_excerpt: --> Advice Surgeries | Chris Bloore MP top of page Advice surgeries As your Member of Parliament, I hold regular advice surgeries across the whole Redditch and the Villages constituency - covering every ward in Redditch, as well as the villages of Feckenham, Harvington & Norton, Inkberrow and Wychbold. ‚Äã These sessions are an opportunity for you to raise issues directly with me and my team, whether they relate to local matters or personal concerns. I am committed to being accessible to all residents, wherever you live - whether in the town centre or in our villages. ‚Äã How to Book an Appointment To request an appointment, please email me at chris.bloore.mp@parliament.uk with the following details: Your full name Your address Your contact details A short summary of your issue ‚Äã My team will then review your enquiry and be in touch if an appointment is needed to progress your case. ‚Äã For security reasons, the exact locations of surgeries are not shared publicly in advance. Once your appointment is confirmed, my team will provide the venue details. ‚Äã Upcoming Surgeries ‚Äã ‚Äã ‚Äã AM, Saturday 18th April - Town Centre (Redditch) AM, Saturday 2nd May - Greenlands (Redditch) PM, Friday 15th May - Inkberrow PM, Friday 29th May - Church Hill (Redditch) PM, Friday 12th June - Batchley (Redditch) ‚Äã ‚Äã ‚Äã Every surgery is an opportunity to ensure your concerns are heard. If you need support or guidance, please don’t hesitate to get in touch.
